top_signals.title: Asset Purchase Facility: Gilt Sales – Market Notice 19 June 2026
top_signals.summary: This Market Notice sets out the schedule for sales in Q3 2026 of gilts held in the Asset Purchase Facility (APF) for monetary policy purposes.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: KKR to control South Korea's $1.3 billion renewables platform with SK as AI power demand rises
top_signals.summary: The announcement came after South Korea announced on Monday three massive investment projects, spanning semiconductors, physical AI and AI data centers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Abu Dhabi’s MGX Raises $49 Billion for One of the Biggest Ever AI Funds
top_signals.summary: MGX has raised $49 billion for one of the biggest ever funds dedicated to artificial intelligence deals, propelling the two-year-old Abu Dhabi firm into the ranks of the most consequential investors in the sector globally.

top_signals.summary: Following a stellar second-quarter rally for European banks, investors expect one of the region’s hottest equity trades to keep delivering.

top_signals.title: Minutes of the Board's discount rate meeting on April 20 and 29, 2026
top_signals.summary: Minutes of the Board's discount rate meeting on April 20 and 29, 2026

top_signals.title: Personal Income and Outlays, April 2026
top_signals.summary: Personal income decreased less than $0.1 billion (less than 0.1 percent at a monthly rate) in April, according to estimates released today by the U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis (BEA). Disposable personal income (DPI)-personal income less personal current taxes-decreased $19.9 billion (0.1 percent), and personal consumption expenditures (PCE) increased $111.1 billion (0.5 percent). Personal outlays-the sum of PCE, personal interest payments, and personal current transfer payments-increased $114.0 billion in April. Personal saving was $611.7 billion in April, and the personal saving rate-personal saving as a percentage of DPI-was 2.6 percent. Full Text
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Anthropic says Trump admin has lifted export controls on Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Department of Commerce lifted the export controls on Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models
